title: clerodendrum garrettianum
intro: Clerodendrum garrettianum, also known as the Garrett's Glory Bower, is a plant species that belongs to the family Lamiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Clerodendrum garrettianum include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and decoctions, can be made to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety in humans.
